title: Australian Mellow Bitter Oat Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring Australian oats, mellow flavors, and a hint of bitterness. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine Australian oats, mellow, and bitter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes.
Add casserole to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is set and the oats are tender.
Serve warm, garnished with additional mellow if desired.
